results.rendered_html:
prārthanaṃ -nā
1 A request, entreaty, prayer, solicitation; ye vardhate dhanapatipuraḥprārthanāduḥkhabhājaḥ  Bh. 3. 47. 
2 A wish, desire; labdhāvakāśā me prārthanā or na duravāpeyaṃ khalu prārthana  Ś. 1 ; 2. 1 ; utsarpiṇī khalu mahatāṃ prārthanā  Ś. 7 ; 7. 
2
3 A suit, petition, supplication, a love-suit; kadācidasmatprārthanāmaṃtaḥpurebhyaḥ kathayet Ś
2 (the object is expressed by the loc.; as in śakuṃtalāyāṃ prārthanā).
Comp.
— bhaṃgaḥ refusal of a requsetrefusal of a request.
— siddhiḥ f. fulfilment of a desire; prārthanāsiddhiśaṃsinaḥ  R. 1. 42.
